creator: alexandr.g@nevosoft.ru
text:
When user connect to mpd5 server configured as pptp server, kernel have panic after successful authorization. In 9.0 BETA 3 it work fine.   
backtrace:

                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
